channel.title: DeepONet on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in DeepONet on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: PDE and ML (2): and Machine Learning (2) — Neural Operator Theory
item.description: A classical PDE solver — finite difference, finite element, spectral — is a function: feed it one initial condition and one set of coefficients, get back one solution. A PINN is the same kind of object dressed in neural-network clothes: each new initial condition demands a fresh round of training. Switch the inflow velocity on a wing or move a single sensor reading in a forecast and you reset the clock.
